name: Speed Pool King
author: Poki
description: Speed Pool King is a fun pool game that challenges your skills in a race against time! With just 2 minutes per round, you must clear the pool table as efficiently as possible to achieve the highest score. Click on the cue ball to position your cue stick for the perfect shot! What is your highest score? How to play Speed Pool King? Click or drag the cue stick to aim. Who created Speed Pool King? Speed Pool King is created by Happylander Ltd. Play their other games on Poki: Bowling Champion , Bottle Flip Challenge , and Penalty Rivals ! How can I play Speed Pool King for free? You can play Speed Pool King for free on Poki. Can I play Speed Pool King on mobile devices and desktop? Speed Pool King can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
